canonical_action: run the retrieval / context-fetch step on a cheaper or smaller model to cut per-document cost
closure_reason: the cheap model's degraded retrieval quality made more generations fail schema validation and re-generate, so the downstream re-generation loops cost more than the retrieval saving
measured_outcome: a one-batch spot check measured ~-14% total per-document cost, but over a sustained week re-generation loops pushed total per-document cost UP ~9%; rolled back
